name: getFileContent
description:
Read the text content of a file. Supports pagination for large files via offset+limit.

Addressing modes:
1. By filename (preferred): relative path e.g. 'dm-notebook/campaign.md'.
2. By URL: absolute http/https URL returned by a previous getFile call.

Pagination: use offset (char position, default 0) and limit (max chars per page, default 100000) to read large files in slices. The response includes total_chars, current_page, total_pages, has_more, and next_offset so you can fetch the next slice. To search a large file for a section, read pages sequentially until you find the relevant content, then stop.

Binary files are rejected. Maximum file size: 5 MB.

filename.description: Relative file path within the user's file store, e.g. 'dm-notebook/campaign.md'.

url.description: Absolute http/https URL of the file. Use when you only have the URL.

offset.description: Character offset to start reading from (default 0). Use next_offset from a previous response to read the next page.

limit.description: Maximum number of characters to return per call (default 100000, max 5242880). Use next_offset from the response to paginate through large files.
